name: Kai
description: Kai is the Boss of the CrossEyes organization, whose symbol and namesake comes from the cross marks around Kai's eyes. Kai's only two interests are food and power. He is a ruthless killer who targets powerful sorcerers and butchers them to appropriate their magical abilities. But he has his own ability, as well: an aura which has the same effect as Hole's rain, crippling any sorcerers in its range. He is timid but greatly interested by what he finds in his travels with Toriko. As a result, he tries to overcome his fear and does his best to help. name: Konoha Suetsugi
description: She is the student council secretary. She idolizes Benio due to how nice Benio was towards her when she first moved into town. As a result, she studied hard to get into the same school, and managed to work her way into the student council to be near Benio. She hates Mashiro due to how close the latter seems with Benio, and even after Mashiro gets into a rant about how much she hates being smothered by her, Konoha refuses to see Benio in a bad light.
